## Summary

## Related issues

<!-- Link any related issues, e.g. "Closes #123" or "Refs #456". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality
      to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Build / CI change

## Implementation notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: design decisions, trade-offs, areas you
     want focused review on. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style (PEP 8, type hints).
- [ ] I have run `pytest` locally and all tests pass.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix or feature works.
- [ ] I have updated documentation (README, docstrings, examples) where
      relevant.
- [ ] I have not added any new third-party dependencies, or I have discussed
      new dependencies with the maintainers in an issue first.
- [ ] My commits have clear, descriptive messages.
- [ ] I have linked any related issues in the section above.
